inputs.text:
Candid realistic photo of a short, petite, athletic woman in her 30s with a narrow frame 
and minimal chest, the dress fabric lying nearly flat against her. Long black hair 
pinned back with loose strands falling against her neck and collarbone. She is wearing 
an elegant ivory colored plunge cowl neck halter dress, the fabric draping with visible 
soft folds across the chest and falling in a deep cowl, with a neckline plunging all 
the way to her waist. The calf length skirt is slit to the waist. She is at a daytime 
wedding reception standing next to a table with a floral centerpiece of deep red peonies 
and white ranunculus in a clear glass vase. She holds a stemmed wine glass by the stem, 
fingers wrapped around it with fingernails visible, white wine with a slight meniscus, 
light refracting through the glass onto her hand. She looks directly at the camera. 
Warm daylight from tall windows to her left, slight fill from overhead reception 
lighting. A second guest is blurred in the background. Photorealistic, shot on 85mm.
